items.title: AlphaEvolve: A Gemini-powered coding agent for designing advanced algorithms — Google DeepMind
items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been highly active in research publishing in early 2026. One of the most notable recent papers is on AlphaEvolve, a Gemini-powered evolutionary coding agent for scientific and algorithmic discovery. AlphaEvolve uses LLMs to mutate and evolve source code rather than numeric parameters, and was applied to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) domains — specifically Counterfactual Regret Minimization (CFR) and Policy Space Response Oracles (PSRO). The system discovered novel

items.title: Google DeepMind on X — AI manipulation measurement toolkit
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google AI and Google DeepMind have been active on X (Twitter) in early 2026 with a series of significant announcements. Key highlights include the launch of Genie 3, a general-purpose world model capable of generating dynamic, interactive 3D environments from a single text prompt, announced via @GoogleAI. Google DeepMind also announced new research partnerships with Boston Dynamics (integrating Gemini Robotics with Atlas humanoid robots) and Agile Robots (embedding Gemini foundation models into

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: The Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026. Key new models include Gemini 3 Flash (Pro-level intelligence at Flash speed/pricing), Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview (successor to Gemini 3 Pro Preview which was shut down March 9, 2026), and Gemini 3 Pro Image for image generation. A new Interactions API launched in Beta provides a unified interface for working with Gemini models and agents, and the Gemini Deep Research Agent launched in preview for autonomous multi-step research tasks. items.title: Build with Google Antigravity, our new agentic development platform
items.author: developers.googleblog.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has received significant updates in early 2026, centered around the launch of Google Antigravity — its new agentic development platform. Antigravity combines an AI-powered IDE with an agent-first interface, allowing developers to autonomously plan, execute, and verify complex tasks across the editor, terminal, and browser. Key features include multiplayer experience creation, automatic Firebase integration (provisioning Cloud Firestore and Firebase Authentication on demand), sup

items.title: Gemini CLI Releases Docs
items.author: google-gemini.github.io
items.snippet: The google-gemini GitHub organization (github.com/google-gemini) has been highly active in 2026, with the flagship gemini-cli repository receiving frequent nightly, preview, and stable releases. As of April 2026, nightly builds such as v0.39.0-nightly.20260409 are published daily from the main branch, preview releases drop every Tuesday at UTC 23:59, and stable releases follow the subsequent Tuesday at UTC 20:00. The Gemini CLI is an open-source AI agent that brings Gemini directly into the term

items.title: Full-Stack Vibe Coding: Building Production-Ready Apps with AI Studio, Stitch & Antigravity | Google Cloud
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio introduced a full-stack vibe coding experience that enables developers to build production-ready applications directly from natural language prompts. The platform integrates the Antigravity coding agent — Google's agent-first IDE launched in late 2025 — which acts as an autonomous project manager that plans projects, writes code across multiple files, installs external libraries (like Framer Motion and Shadcn), runs tests, catches errors, and iterates without user intervention.

items.title: Genkit Overview - firebase.google.com
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI development framework built and maintained by Google, available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. It enables developers to build, deploy, and monitor production-ready AI-powered applications using familiar code-centric patterns. Key capabilities include a unified interface for integrating with hundreds of AI models (Google Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, and more), a Flow abstraction for composing AI logic with built-in observability and streaming, and a l
